data.title: South Korea Moves Toward Spot Bitcoin ETFs in 2026 Strategy
data.description:
South Korea is preparing to open its market to spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds this year as part of a broader effort to support economic growth and modernize its financial system. While regulatory and legal work is still underway, officials have signaled that the direction is now firmly set.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/south-korea-moves-toward-spot-bitcoin-etfs-in-2026-strategy/

data.title: White House Economic Advisor Calls for Further Fed Rate Cuts
data.description: According to Odaily, White House Economic Advisor Kevin Hassett has stated that the Federal Reserve needs to implement further interest rate cuts. He also mentioned that there is a comprehensive backup plan regarding tariffs.

data.title: Over $30 million in liquidations occurred across the entire network in the past hour, with ETH liquidations reaching $10.91 million.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $31.9925 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, including $11.85 million in long positions and $20.13 million in short positions. In addition, $10.91 million in ETH positions were liquidated and $10.49 million in BTC positions were liquidated.

data.title: Buterin signals support for privacy ahead of January 26 verdict for Tornado Cash’s Storm
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin publicly backed Tornado Cash developer Roman Storm ahead of his January 22 hearing, framing privacy as essential to civil society.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/buterin-support-privacy-tornado-cash-storm/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 91,000 USDT with a 0.70% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 09, 2026, 15:27 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 91,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 91,138.796875 USDT, with a narrowed 0.70% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Coinbase Markets Year-End Review: 110 Crypto Assets and 100 Perpetual Contracts Launched by 2025
data.description: Coinbase Markets released its 2025 review, revealing that it launched 110 new crypto assets last year, bringing the total number of tradable crypto assets to over 350. The platform also launched 100 perpetual contracts, bringing the total number of tradable perpetual contracts to 199. Coinbase Markets stated that 2025 was a significant turning point for Coinbase derivatives, introducing 24/7 trading. Perpetual futures open interest surpassed $1 billion in June, and the platform's total open interest for perpetual and futures contracts reached a peak of $4.8 billion in October. In 2026, the platform plans to further expand its product portfolio with new indices, stocks, and emerging assets.

data.title: Fed mouthpiece: Non-farm payroll report provides ample reason for Fed to hold rates steady this month
data.description: Nick Timiraos, often referred to as the "Federal Reserve mouthpiece," recently wrote: "Tonight's December jobs report provides ample reason for Fed officials to remain on the sidelines at this month's meeting. Nonfarm payrolls increased by only 50,000, and the three-month average of private sector hiring fell to 29,000, the second-lowest growth rate of the year. This sluggish pace of job growth underscores the dynamic of a 'slow hiring, slow laying off' labor market in 2025. However, the decline in the unemployment rate has temporarily eased extreme concerns about a deteriorating labor market. It is precisely these concerns that have prompted the Fed to cut interest rates in the last three meetings. This report reinforces market expectations that the Fed will hold rates steady at its January 27-28 meeting, but the weak hiring data also ensures that the debate about the health of the labor market is far from over." (Jinshi)

data.title: South Korea to Allow Spot Bitcoin ETFs in 2026 Growth Plan
data.description:
South Korea's 2026 Economic Growth Strategy includes spot Bitcoin ETF introduction following active trading in US and Hong Kong markets, while phase-two digital asset legislation establishing stablecoin regulatory frameworks remains stalled over governance disputes as authorities impose ₩27. 3 billion Korbit fine and prepare 24-hour forex trading expansion starting July.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/south-korea-to-allow-spot-bitcoin-etfs-in-2026-growth-plan/

data.title: Tether Invests in Bitcoin-Backed Lending Firm Ledn
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Tether has invested between $40 million and $50 million in Ledn, a company that offers fiat and stablecoin loans backed by Bitcoin. This investment has raised Ledn's valuation to approximately $500 million.

data.title: The U.S. Supreme Court will not rule on the Trump administration's tariff case on Friday.
data.description: The U.S. Supreme Court will not rule on the Trump administration's tariff case on Friday. (Jinshi)

data.title: Tether invested $40-50 million in Ledn in November 2025.
data.description: According to a source familiar with the matter, Tether invested between $40 million and $50 million in Ledn, a company that provides fiat and stablecoin loans backed by Bitcoin, in November 2025. This investment valued Ledn at approximately $500 million. (CoinDesk)

data.title: BNY activates tokenized deposit service for payments and collateral
data.description:
BNY launched a tokenized deposit service on Jan. 9, enabling blockchain based payments and collateral for institutional clients.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/384930/bny-activates-tokenized-deposit-service-payments-collateral?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Bitcoin Market Analysis Suggests Caution Amid Increased Demand for Downside Protection
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on January 9, glassnode analyzed Bitcoin's market trends using options market data. The report highlights that the options data suggests the market should remain cautious rather than panicked. While volatility sellers are still active, skew and flow indicate a growing demand for downside protection. The market is currently hedging risks, and a complete trend reversal has not yet been priced in.

data.title: Glassnode: Bitcoin retests $90,000, downside protection demand increases and hedges begin.
data.description: Glassnode, in an article published on the X platform, stated that options market data shows market sentiment turned cautious as Bitcoin retested the $90,000 level. Implied volatility rose as prices moved towards $94,000, then declined as prices stalled, indicating that volatility sellers intervened after momentum weakened. Furthermore, the volatility risk premium remains positive, favoring volatility sellers. Options flows over the past 24 hours show that buy-put options accounted for nearly 30% of trades, reflecting increased demand for downside insurance and hedging ahead of price weakness and key US macroeconomic data releases, rather than anticipating a trend breakout.

data.title: Spot silver rose 3% on the day, currently trading at $79.27 per ounce.
data.description: Spot silver rose 3.00% on the day, currently trading at $79.27 per ounce. (Jinshi)

data.title: RWA distribution infrastructure TBook has raised over $10 million in funding, led by SevenX Ventures.
data.description: RWA distribution infrastructure TBook announced the completion of a new funding round, led by SevenX Ventures, with participation from KuCoin Ventures, Mask Network, HT Capital, VistaLabs, Blofin, Bonfire Union, LYVC, GoPlus, and others. The company stated that its total funding has exceeded $10 million and it is currently building an embedded RWA liquidity layer aimed at connecting asset issuers with qualified users. (Chainwire)

data.title: The preliminary reading for the US one-year inflation rate in January was 4.2%, compared to a forecast of 4.1%.
data.description: The preliminary reading for the US one-year inflation rate in January was 4.2%, below the expected 4.1% and the previous reading of 4.20%. (Jinshi)

data.title: No release for French tax agent who gave crypto investor details to gangs
data.description:
The French civil servant was found using tax software to snoop on crypto investors, French billionaire Vincent Bolloré, and prison guards.
source: https://protos.com/no-release-for-french-tax-agent-who-gave-crypto-investor-details-to-gangs/
